'''ât-s-j-w''' ('''katasjewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photo|photo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photo|photo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-s-j-w
|-
! Lemma
| katasjewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
